summary: Comprehensive testing of TrackLog trainspotting app - All core features working correctly. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows tested successfully including auth, sightings CRUD, protected routes, and profile management.

minor.issue: Returns frontend HTML instead of JSON health check - frontend catches /health route first

ui_bugs.issue: Password section shows 'You signed in with Google' message for email-registered demo user - may be checking wrong field for auth provider

issues: Minor: Password section incorrectly identifies demo@tracklog.com as Google user when they registered with email

action_items: Fix ProfilePage.jsx to correctly detect auth provider - check user.auth_provider field from backend instead of checking for password_hash
critical_code_review_comments: ProfilePage.jsx line 222: isGoogleUser check uses `!user.password_hash` but backend doesn't return password_hash field in /auth/me response. Should check `user.auth_provider === 'google'` instead
seed_data_creation: Demo user created via registration if not exists. Test sightings created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested and working: registration, login, logout, protected routes redirect, sighting creation with traction type, sightings list with search, dashboard stats, profile page. The only minor issue is ProfilePage incorrectly detecting auth provider for email users.

auth.registration: PASS - New users can register and are redirected to dashboard
auth.login: PASS - Demo user can login with email/password
auth.logout: PASS - Logout clears session and redirects to landing page
auth.protected_routes: PASS - /dashboard, /log-sighting, /sightings, /profile all redirect to /auth when not logged in

sightings.create: PASS - Form renders all fields including traction type, submission works
sightings.list: PASS - My Sightings shows grid view with search functionality
sightings.stats: PASS - Dashboard shows stats cards and top lists

profile.view: PASS - Profile page loads with user info
profile.password_section: MINOR ISSUE - Incorrectly shows Google message for email users
